# =========================================================
# Pig-Human Correlation Odds Ratio Heatmap
# =========================================================
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ComplexHeatmap)
  library(circlize)   
  library(grid)
})

source("./config_odds.R")

odds   <- as.matrix(read.table("./pig_human_OR.txt", header = TRUE, row.names = 1, sep = "\t", check.names = FALSE))
odds_p <- as.matrix(read.table("./pig_human_pvalue.txt", header = TRUE, row.names = 1, sep = "\t", check.names = FALSE))

odds[is.na(odds) | is.infinite(odds)] <- 0
odds_p[is.na(odds_p) | is.infinite(odds_p)] <- 1
odds_p <- odds_p[rownames(odds), colnames(odds), drop = FALSE]

row_order2 <- intersect(row_order, rownames(odds))
col_order2 <- intersect(col_order, colnames(odds))

odds   <- odds[row_order2, col_order2, drop = FALSE]
odds_p <- odds_p[row_order2, col_order2, drop = FALSE]

cap <- 3
odds_plot <- odds
odds_plot[odds_plot < 0] <- 0
odds_plot[odds_plot > cap] <- cap

my_colors <- c("#2166AC", "#4393C3", "#92C5DE", "#D1E5F0", "#F7F7F7",
               "#FDDBC7", "#F4A582", "#D6604D", "#B2182B", "#67001F")

breaks <- c(seq(0, 1, length.out = 4), seq(1, cap, length.out = 7)[-1]) 
col_fun <- colorRamp2(breaks, my_colors)

cell_w <- unit(5, "mm")   
cell_h <- unit(5, "mm")   
body_w <- cell_w * ncol(odds_plot)
body_h <- cell_h * nrow(odds_plot)

ht <- Heatmap(
  odds_plot, name = "Odds_ratio", col = col_fun,
  cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_row_dend = FALSE, show_column_dend = FALSE,
  show_column_names = TRUE, show_row_names = TRUE,
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 9), column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 9),
  width = body_w, height = body_h, use_raster = TRUE,
  
  cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, w, h, fill) {
    if (odds[i, j] > 1) {
      if (odds_p[i, j] < 0.001) grid.text("***", x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 9))
      else if (odds_p[i, j] < 0.01) grid.text("**",  x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 9))
      else if (odds_p[i, j] < 0.05) grid.text("*",   x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 9))
    }
  }
)


out_pdf <- "Figure7A.pdf"
pdf_w_in <- convertWidth(unit(55, "mm") + body_w + unit(55, "mm"), "in", valueOnly = TRUE)
pdf_h_in <- convertHeight(unit(55, "mm") + body_h + unit(55, "mm"), "in", valueOnly = TRUE)

pdf(out_pdf, width = pdf_w_in, height = pdf_h_in)
draw(ht, heatmap_legend_side = "right")
dev.off()

message("Saved: ", out_pdf)
